description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of DriFit 100% recycled polyester, with raglan sleeves in black, white and red colours, appliqued club badge on the left chest, embroidered swoosh logo on the right chest, sponsor logo on the front, vented hem with contrast interior lining, team initials at center back neck and aerographic mesh pattern on the backFittingRegular  Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not use softeners Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Line dry Do not iron Do not dry clean Return to greatness with the 2010/11 manchester united football Club Soccer jersey from nike. This jersey pays homage to the incredibly successful team with strong design details like the team colours and club badge with "Believe" printed on the inside behind the badge. The chevron, replicating the pattern Manchester United wore when Old Tafford first opened 100 years ago, is subtly revealed on the back of this jersey. The Dri-Fit performance fabric ensures breathability and comfort on and off the field. This sweat-wicking Dri-FIT fabric was made from the equivalent of eight recycled plastic bottles thereby the production of this jersey has minimal environmental impact.
